title: stelis cingens
intro: Stelis cingens, also known as the "Chain Orchid", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis cingens include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
